_comment: Catalyst AppSail app config for DRISHTI (demo tier). Docker stack = this image is built from catalyst/Dockerfile. Replace placeholders before `catalyst deploy`. AppSail injects the listen port via X_ZOHO_CATALYST_LISTEN_PORT.
name: drishti

_production_overrides._comment: For the sovereign/production tier, switch these via Catalyst env config (no code change). DATABASE_URL points at Catalyst Data Store / managed Postgres; LLM served via Catalyst QuickML.
